title: Knowledge Index
description: The read-only, rebuildable JSON projection of vault career entities (ADR-0012). Stored at vault/.library/index/knowledge-index.json. Git-ignored. Never user-edited. The vault remains the SSOT (ADR-0001/0003). Includes relation graph edges per ADR-0016 Rule 7.

schema_version.description: Semver of the index format. A schema bump invalidates the index; the next rebuild picks up the new shape.

built_at.description: ISO 8601 datetime when the index was last built.

entity_count.description: Total number of entities across all types.

entities.description: Keys are entity-type folder names from resumeos.config.yaml: vault.entities. Each value is an array of entity summaries. All 9 types are required; empty arrays represent zero entities of that type.

edges.description: Relation graph edges (ADR-0016 Rule 7). Maps entity-id to its outgoing and incoming typed relations. Rebuildable from entity frontmatter relations[]. Optional — may be absent if no relations are indexed yet.

outgoing.description: entity-id -> [{type, peer}] relations this entity points to.

incoming.description: entity-id -> [{type, peer}] relations pointing at this entity.

type.description: Entity type, matching the folder key.

folder.description: Vault folder path for this entity type.

path.description: Vault path to the entity note.

updated.description: ISO 8601 date of last entity update, or null if unknown.

summary.description: One-line summary extracted from the note, or null.

key_fields.description: High-signal fields per entity type (role/company/stack for projects; issuer/date for awards; DOI/venue for research; proficiency/last_used for skills). The full frontmatter stays in the vault note.

peer.description: Wikilink of the related entity: [[entity-id]]. 'target' for outgoing edges, 'source' for incoming edges.
